def test_list_terms_requires_case_or_bucket_scope():
    with pytest.raises(HTTPException) as ctx:
        kb.list_terms(db=_FakeDB([]))

    assert ctx.value.status_code == 400
    assert "case_id or bucket_id is required" in str(ctx.value.detail)
